name: referralhero
description: Reads ReferralHero lists, subscribers, referrals, rewards, coupon groups, and campaign-scoped subscriber resources, and performs approved ReferralHero API v2 mutations.

risk.read: external ReferralHero API read of referral program list, subscriber, referral, reward, and coupon data
risk.write: creates and mutates live ReferralHero campaign, subscriber, transaction, reward, coupon, and qualification state; approval required before execution
risk.approval: reverse ETL plan approval required before writes
